mapper.select: SELECT airport_trip as airport_code, '肯尼迪国际机场' as airport_name, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, 0.0 as total_amount, 0.0 as avg_amount, 0.0 as avg_distance FROM analysis_airport WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY airport_trip UNION ALL SELECT 'LGA' as airport_code, '拉瓜迪亚机场' as airport_name, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, 0.0 as total_amount, 0.0 as avg_amount, 0.0 as avg_distance FROM analysis_airport WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND airport_trip = 'LGA' GROUP BY airport_trip UNION ALL SELECT 'EWR' as airport_code, '纽瓦克自由国际机场' as airport_name, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, 0.0 as total_amount, 0.0 as avg_amount, 0.0 as avg_distance FROM analysis_airport WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND airport_trip = 'EWR' GROUP BY airport_trip

SELECT airport_trip as airport_code, 0 as hour, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, false as peak_hour FROM analysis_airport WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND airport_trip = #{airportCode} GROUP BY airport_trip

SELECT CASE WHEN vendor_name = 'Creative Mobile Technologies' THEN '1' WHEN vendor_name = 'VeriFone Inc' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END as vendor_id, vendor_name, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, SUM(total_revenue) as total_amount, AVG(avg_distance) as avg_trip_distance, 0.0 as market_share FROM analysis_vendor WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY vendor_name

SELECT stat_date as date, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, CASE WHEN vendor_name = 'Creative Mobile Technologies' THEN '1' WHEN vendor_name = 'VeriFone Inc' THEN '2' ELSE '1' END as vendor_id FROM analysis_vendor WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND vendor_name = (CASE WHEN #{vendorId} = '1' THEN 'Creative Mobile Technologies' ELSE 'VeriFone Inc' END) GROUP BY stat_date ORDER BY stat_date

SELECT CASE WHEN payment_name = '信用卡' THEN '1' WHEN payment_name = '现金' THEN '2' WHEN payment_name = '无消费' THEN '3' WHEN payment_name = '争议' THEN '4' ELSE '1' END as payment_type, payment_name as payment_desc, CASE WHEN payment_name = '信用卡' THEN 'credit_card' WHEN payment_name = '现金' THEN 'cash' WHEN payment_name = '无消费' THEN 'no_charge' WHEN payment_name = '争议' THEN 'dispute' ELSE 'credit_card' END as payment_code, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, AVG(trip_ratio) as percentage, SUM(total_amount) as total_amount FROM analysis_payment_analysis WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY payment_name

SELECT stat_date as date, SUM(CASE WHEN payment_name = '信用卡' THEN trip_count ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(trip_count), 0) as credit_card_pct, SUM(CASE WHEN payment_name = '现金' THEN trip_count ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(trip_count), 0) as cash_pct FROM analysis_payment_analysis WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY stat_date ORDER BY stat_date

SELECT distance_range, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, 0.0 as percentage FROM analysis_distance_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY distance_range ORDER BY CASE distance_range WHEN '0-2' THEN 1 WHEN '2-5' THEN 2 WHEN '5-10' THEN 3 WHEN '10-15' THEN 4 WHEN '15-20' THEN 5 WHEN '20+' THEN 6 ELSE 7 END

SELECT duration_range, SUM(trip_count) as trip_count, 0.0 as percentage FROM analysis_duration_distribution WHERE stat_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY duration_range ORDER BY CASE duration_range WHEN '0-10' THEN 1 WHEN '10-20' THEN 2 WHEN '20-30' THEN 3 WHEN '30-45' THEN 4 WHEN '45-60' THEN 5 WHEN '60+' THEN 6 ELSE 7 END
